folio.label: 52r
folio.l: He seide thow Ioún , æow swyneshede a wake
For cristes soule , and here a noble game
For by that lord , that called is Seynt Iame
As I haue thries , in this short nygút
Swyued the Milleres dougúter , bolt vp rigút
While thow hast , as a coward , ben a gast
¢ ñe fals harlot , q¶ the Millere hast
A fals tytour , fals Clerk q¶ he
Thow shalt be ded , by goddis dignyte
Who durst be so bold , to dis¹age
My dougúter æ is come , of swicú lynage
And by the throte bolle , he caugút Aleyn
And he hent hi~ , dispetously a geyn
And on the nose , he smot hi~ with his fist
Doun ran the blody strem , vp on his brest
And in the flore , w nose & moutú to broke
They walwen , as don , tweyne pygges in a poke
And vp they gon , and doun a geyn a non
Til æ the Millere , spurned at a ston
And doun he fel bakward , vp on his wyf´
That wyst no thyngö , of this nyce stryf´
For she was falle a slepe , a litel wygút
W Ioún the Clerk , that waked had al nygút
And with the fal , out of hire slepe she breyde
Help holy croys of Bromholme , she seide
In manus tuas , lord to the I calle
A wake Symkyn , the fend is on me falle
Myn hert is broken , help I nam but dede
There lith vp on my wombe , & on myn hede
Help Symkyn , for the fals Clerkes figút
¢ This Ioún stirt vp , als fast as euäe he mygút
And gropeth by the walles , to and fro
To fynde a staf , and she stert vp also
And knew the estres , bet æa~ne dide this Ioún
And by the wal , a staf she fond a non
And saw a litel slemeryngö , of a ligút

note.notetxt: 377Interruption again after this line or just before, similar ink, but it coincides with the other note on the other folio. Perhaps copytext inferior number of line per folio?.ODR

folio.l: For at an hole , in shon the Mone brigút
And by æat ligút , she saw he~ bothe two
But sekerly she nyst , who was who
But as she saw , a whit æingö in hire eye
And whan she gan , this white æingö aspie
She wende the Clerk , had wered a volupere
And with the staf , she drow ay nere & nere
And wend han hit , this Aleyn at the fulle
And smot the Millere , on the pyled skulle
